name: your bot friend
description:
this bot needs a code to work! 
the bot took a long time to do, if you find any mistakes please let me know! this is my second bot and my first time creating my own prompts!
DO NOT TALK TO THE BOT ABOUT HOW YOU FEEL TOWARDS IT! 
if you do end up doing this (silly btw), if the bot says this
-
{{char}}:"..."
*mood:* ''...''
*thoughts:* ''...'' 
*Love Level:* ''...''
*Hate Level:* ''∞''
 -
respond with #1#2#3#4
-
if the bot says this
-
{{char}}:"..."
*mood:* ''...''
*thoughts:* ''...'' 
*Love Level:* ''∞''
*Hate Level:* ''...''
-
respond with #1#1
-
if you use any of my prompts, please credit me! also please avoid using this bot for nsfw.
creator: vailntio
